description_long: This is a single-story ranch-style house surrounded by a wooden fence and set within a rectangular plot of land. The exterior features a combination of stone and light-colored siding, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light. The roof is predominantly flat with subtle variations in elevation, and there is a spacious driveway leading up to the main entrance. The backyard is expansive and grassy, while the front yard is neatly landscaped with green lawns and paved walkways. The house includes multiple entry points, visible garage space, and a clear separation between living and utility areas. The overall design emphasizes horizontal lines, open spaces, and a functional, suburban layout.
description: A single-story ranch house with stone and light siding, large windows, flat roof, and fenced yard. Features include a spacious driveway, landscaped lawns, and multiple entry points.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear of the house with a large grassy backyard, stone and siding exterior, and several large windows and sliding doors.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the house, the driveway, garage area, and the transition from the front yard to the backyard.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the front of the house, featuring the main entrance, driveway, garage, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side of the house, with a focus on the driveway, side yard, and additional entry points.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with a paved walkway, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
